title: Actium
description: Actium is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack like Additive and Performium that boosts FPS and improves performance and graphics with mods such as Sodium, Lithium and much more.
body:
# ‎ ![Actium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/882b7a127dfa8fced74ab7e48975eb196f158ebf.png)
**Actium is a Fabric-based Minecraft modpack that will take your gaming experience to the next level. It combines the best mods for FPS boosting and graphics enhancement, giving you a smooth and stunning gameplay.**

## 🔥Performance
Get higher FPS thanks to mods that optimize the game engine, reduce lag, and fix bugs. Enjoy faster chunk loading, smoother animations, and less memory usage. Play with more mods without sacrificing performance.

![Comparison of the FPS in 1.21.1 vanilla minecraft vs Actium 2.1.3.](https://i.imgur.com/jLeShWk.jpeg)

## 🥨 Features
### Shaders 🌿
Use shaders to make your game look more realistic and beautiful, with dynamic lighting, shadows, reflections, and more. Choose from a variety of shader packs or create your own. Customize the shader settings to suit your preferences and system capabilities.

### Useful tweaks 🛠️
Actium has many useful tweaks that don't change the vanilla feel, for example: Longer chat history, Zoom, In-Game Account Switching, Bug and utility fixes and much more..

### Cosmetics and Capes 🦹
Actium not only enhances gameplay with a variety of new features and improvements, but it also includes custom capes and cosmetics, allowing players to personalize their characters with unique and stylish designs, making every adventure in the blocky world even more exciting and visually appealing.

### Better Screenshots 🖼️
Actium also enhances the screenshot system by providing higher quality screenshots and automatically copying them to your clipboard for easy access.

## 💮 Less Features
[Delium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/delium) is a more simple, lightweight and smoother version of [Actium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/actium) for users that want the original, pure optimization minecraft without adding new features.
